title: User equipments, base stations and methods for physical downlink control channel monitoring in downlink
abstract: A user equipment (UE) is described. The UE includes receiving circuitry configured to receive a radio resource control (RRC) signal including information used for configuring the UE to monitor physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) candidates either for a downlink control information (DCI) format 0_1 and a DCI format 1_1 or a first DCI format and a second DCI format. The UE also includes transmitting circuitry configured to perform a transmission on a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH). In a case that the PUSCH is scheduled by using the second DCI format, a first hybrid automatic repeat request-acknowledgment (HARQ-ACK) and a second HARQ-ACK are multiplexed on the PUSCH. The number of resources for the first HARQ-ACK and the number of resources for the second HARQ-ACK are respectively determined.
claims:
Claims 1. A user equipment (UE), comprising: receiving circuitry configured to receive a radio resource control (RRC) signal including information used for configuring the UE to monitor physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) candidates either for a downlink control information (DCI) format 0_l and a DCI format l_l or a first DCI format and a second DCI format; and transmitting circuitry configured to perform a transmission on a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH), wherein in a case that the PUSCH is scheduled by using the second DCI format, a first hybrid automatic repeat request-acknowledgment (HARQ-ACK) and a second HARQ-ACK are multiplexed on the PUSCH, and the number of resources for the first HARQ-ACK and the number of resources for the second HARQ-ACK are respectively determined. 2. The UE of claim 1, wherein: the DCI format 0_l is used for scheduling of a PUSCH, the DCI format l_l is used for scheduling of a physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH), and the first DCI format is used for scheduling of a PDSCH. 3. A base station apparatus, comprising: transmitting circuitry configured to transmit a radio resource control (RRC) signal including information used for configuring a user equipment (UE) to monitor physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) candidates either for a downlink control information (DCI) format 0_l and a DCI format l_l or a first DCI format and a second DCI format; and 

 receiving circuitry configured to perform a reception of a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH), wherein in a case that the PUSCH is scheduled by using the second DCI format, a first hybrid automatic repeat request-acknowledgment (HARQ-ACK) and a second HARQ-ACK are multiplexed on the PUSCH, and the number of resources for the first HARQ-ACK and the number of resources for the second HARQ-ACK are respectively determined. 4. The base station apparatus of claim 3, wherein: the DCI format 0_l is used for scheduling of a PUSCH, the DCI format l_l is used for scheduling of a physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH), and the first DCI format is used for scheduling of a PDSCH. 5. A communication method of a user equipment (UE), comprising: receiving a radio resource control (RRC) signal including information used for configuring the UE to monitor physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) candidates either for a downlink control information (DCI) format 0_l and a DCI format l_l or a first DCI format and a second DCI format; and performing a transmission on a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH), wherein in a case that the PUSCH is scheduled by using the second DCI format, a first hybrid automatic repeat request-acknowledgment (HARQ-ACK) and a second HARQ-ACK are multiplexed on the PUSCH, and the number of resources for the first HARQ-ACK and the number of resources for the second HARQ-ACK are respectively determined. 6. The communication method of claim 5, wherein: the DCI format 0_l is used for scheduling of a PUSCH, 

 the DCI format l_l is used for scheduling of a physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH), and the first DCI format is used for scheduling of a PDSCH. 7. A communication method of a base station apparatus, comprising: transmitting a radio resource control (RRC) signal including information a user equipment (UE) to monitor physical downlink control channel (PDCCH) candidates either for a downlink control information (DCI) format 0_l and a DCI format l_l or a first DCI format and a second DCI format, and performing a reception of a physical uplink shared channel (PUSCH), wherein in a case that the PUSCH is scheduled by using the second DCI format, a first hybrid automatic repeat request-acknowledgment (HARQ-ACK) and a second HARQ-ACK are multiplexed on the PUSCH, and the number of resources for the first HARQ-ACK and the number of resources for the second HARQ-ACK are respectively determined. 8. The communication method of claim 7, wherein: the DCI format 0_l is used for scheduling of a PUSCH, the DCI format l_l is used for scheduling of a physical downlink shared channel (PDSCH), and the first DCI format is used for scheduling of a PDSCH.
